name: ROS MRO Real-Time WebSocket & SEPPA AI Integration
description: Complete the ROS MRO real-time coordination system by integrating WebSocket for sub-second updates (M5) and SEPPA AI assistant for context-aware construction intelligence (M6). This enables field workers to receive instant voxel status changes and interact with an AI assistant that understands their current spatial context.

scalability.implementation: WebSocket broadcasts fan out through Redis adapter
scalability.rationale: Multiple API gateway instances can serve WebSocket connections

resilience.implementation: Fallback to polling if WebSocket disconnects
resilience.rationale: System remains functional even with network issues

separation.implementation: WebSocket handler separate from REST routes, context injection pattern for SEPPA

observability.implementation: Connection metrics, message throughput, SEPPA tool execution logs

milestones.name: WebSocket Broadcast Integration
milestones.description: Add WebSocket broadcast calls to voxels.routes.ts for real-time updates
completionCriteria: PATCH /voxels/:voxelId/status broadcasts to WebSocket subscribers
POST /voxels/batch broadcasts batch updates
Activity events broadcast to project subscribers

changes.action: Import getVoxelStreamHandler and call broadcastVoxelUpdate after status changes

technicalDetails.testing: Integration test verifying WebSocket receives update after REST call

milestones.name: Redis Pub/Sub Adapter
milestones.description: Add Redis adapter for horizontal WebSocket scaling
completionCriteria: WebSocket broadcasts propagate across multiple API gateway instances
Redis connection failure gracefully degrades to local-only broadcasts
Metrics track cross-instance message propagation

technicalDetails.pattern: Redis Pub/Sub with channel per project
technicalDetails.failover: Local Map-based fallback if Redis unavailable

milestones.name: ROSMROView WebSocket Integration
milestones.description: Wire useVoxelStream hook into ROSMROView component
completionCriteria: useVoxelStream hook connected with projectId
Connection status indicator visible in UI
Automatic cache invalidation on WebSocket updates
Graceful fallback to polling on disconnect

technicalDetails.cacheIntegration: React Query cache automatically updated by hook

milestones.name: SEPPA Panel Integration
milestones.description: Add SEPPAChatPanel to ROSMROView with FAB trigger
completionCriteria: FAB button in bottom-right opens SEPPA panel
Panel receives projectId and selectedVoxelId props
User authority level passed from auth context
Panel closes gracefully and preserves conversation

technicalDetails.trigger: Floating Action Button with SmartToy icon

milestones.name: Voxel-Aware SEPPA Context
milestones.description: Enhance SEPPA system prompt with voxel selection context
completionCriteria: System prompt includes selected voxel details
Voxel status, health, and decision count in context
Active alerts surfaced to AI
Adjacent voxels mentioned for spatial awareness

milestones.name: Decision Surface Tools Registration
milestones.description: Register 6 decision surface MCP tools with SEPPA assistant
completionCriteria: get_voxel_decisions tool available to assistant
acknowledge_decision tool available
apply_tolerance_override tool available
query_tolerance_overrides tool available
request_inspection tool available
complete_inspection tool available

technicalDetails.integration: Add to MCP tool list in assistant service initialization

implementationOrder.name: WebSocket Foundation
implementationOrder.rationale: Backend must broadcast before frontend can receive

implementationOrder.name: WebSocket Frontend
implementationOrder.rationale: Frontend integration depends on backend broadcasts

implementationOrder.name: SEPPA Integration
implementationOrder.rationale: Can proceed in parallel with WebSocket once M5.1 started

websocketFailure.fallback: React Query polling continues at 30s staleTime

redisFailure.impact: Multi-instance environments won't see cross-instance updates

seppaOverload.mitigation: Rate limiting per user, conversation queuing

integration: SEPPA tool execution with voxel context
e2e: Update voxel status, verify real-time UI update
Open SEPPA, ask about selected voxel, verify context-aware response

m5Complete.target: <500ms from status change to UI update
m5Complete.measurement: Timestamp diff between REST response and WebSocket message

m6Complete.target: AI correctly references selected voxel in 95% of relevant queries
